title: oncidium toachicum
intro: Oncidium toachi is a species of orchid native to Ecuador. This epiphytic plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its roots and flowers are used to treat various ailments. The roots of Oncidium toachi have been reported to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which may provide relief from fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the roots are often dried and made into teas or infusions to leverage its medicinal benefits.
